ok.sql: SELECT TOP @top * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'apk_install' AND c.app = @app AND c.brandKey = @brandKey ORDER BY c.ts DESC
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type = 'apk_install' AND c.app = @app AND c.brandKey = @brandKey
SELECT c.wallet, c.name, c.appUrl FROM c WHERE c.type = @type
SELECT TOP 1 * FROM c WHERE c.brandKey = @brandKey AND c.type = 'partner_application' ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.name, c.industryPack, c.loyalty, c.industryPackActivatedAt, c.slug, c.theme, c.kioskEnabled, c.terminalEnabled FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config'
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type = 'api_key' AND c.keyHash = @hash
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'apim_subscription' AND c.subscriptionId = @sid
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'api_key' AND c.keyHash = @hash
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.wallet = @wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.wallet = @wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.wallet = @wallet
SELECT c.id, c.merchantWallet, c.role, c.name FROM c WHERE c.type = 'merchant_team_member' AND c.linkedWallet = @w
SELECT c.wallet, c.name, c.theme FROM c WHERE c.type = 'shop_config' AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.wallet)

SELECT TOP 1 VALUE c FROM c WHERE c.type=@type AND c.wallet=@wallet AND (IS_DEFINED(c.splitAddress) OR (IS_DEFINED(c.split.address) AND LENGTH(c.split.address) > 0) OR IS_DEFINED(c.config.splitAddress) OR (IS_DEFINED(c.config.split.address) AND LENGTH(c.config.split.address) > 0)) ORDER BY c.updatedAt DESC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE NOT IS_DEFINED(c.jiraIssueKey) OR c.jiraIssueKey = null
SELECT * FROM c ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id
SELECT TOP @top * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'app_install' AND c.app = @app AND (c.brandKey = @brandKey OR NOT IS_DEFINED(c.brandKey) OR c.brandKey = null OR c.brandKey = '') ORDER BY c.ts DESC
SELECT TOP @top * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'app_install' AND c.app = @app AND c.brandKey = @brandKey ORDER BY c.ts DESC
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type = 'app_install' AND c.app = @app AND (c.brandKey = @brandKey OR NOT IS_DEFINED(c.brandKey) OR c.brandKey = null OR c.brandKey = '')
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type = 'app_install' AND c.app = @app AND c.brandKey = @brandKey
SELECT top 1 c.status FROM c WHERE c.type = 'client_request' AND c.wallet = @w AND c.brandKey = @b
SELECT top 1 c.setupComplete FROM c WHERE (c.type = 'shop_config' OR c.type = 'site_config') AND c.wallet = @w AND c.brandKey = @b AND c.setupComplete = true
SELECT c.type, c.seconds FROM c WHERE c.wallet = @w
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'shop_config' AND c.wallet = @w AND c.brandKey = @b
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'client_request' AND c.wallet = @w AND c.brandKey = @b
SELECT c.id, c.type, c.wallet, c.brandKey, c.status FROM c WHERE (c.type = 'shop_config' OR c.type = 'client_request') AND StringEquals(c.wallet, @w, true) AND StringEquals(c.brandKey, @b, true)
SELECT TOP @limit c FROM c WHERE c.type=@type AND c.wallet=@wallet ORDER BY c.updatedAt DESC
SELECT TOP @limit VALUE c FROM c WHERE c.type=@type AND c.wallet=@wallet ORDER BY c.updatedAt DESC

SELECT TOP @limit VALUE c FROM c WHERE c.type=@type AND (LOWER(c.wallet)=@addr OR LOWER(c.splitAddress)=@addr OR LOWER(c.split.address)=@addr OR LOWER(c.config.splitAddress)=@addr OR LOWER(c.config.split.address)=@addr) ORDER BY c.updatedAt DESC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'api_key' AND c.id = @id AND c.ownerWallet = @wallet
SELECT c.theme, c.wallet, c.slug, c.customDomain FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND (LOWER(c.slug) = @slug OR LOWER(c.customDomain) = @slug)

SELECT c.wallet, c.displayName, c.pfpUrl, c.spaceUrl, c.liveSince, c.lastHeartbeat FROM c WHERE c.type='user' AND c.live=true AND c.spacePublic=true AND c.lastHeartbeat > @cut ORDER BY c.lastHeartbeat DESC
SELECT c.wallet, c.displayName, c.pfpUrl, c.xp FROM c WHERE c.type='user' AND IS_DEFINED(c.xp) ORDER BY c.xp DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT @lim
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.wallet = @wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.wallet = @wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='inventory_item' AND c.wallet=@wallet AND c.industryPack='restaurant'
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='uber_eats_order'
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.slug = @slug OR (c.customDomain = @slug AND c.customDomainVerified = true)
SELECT c.wallet, c.name FROM c WHERE c.slug = @slug OR (c.customDomain = @slug AND c.customDomainVerified = true)
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='inventory_item' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.slug = @slug OR (c.customDomain = @slug AND c.customDomainVerified = true)

SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='inventory_item' AND c.wallet=@wallet AND ((NOT IS_DEFINED(c.attributes) OR NOT IS_DEFINED(c.attributes.type) OR c.attributes.type != 'publishing') OR (c.attributes.type = 'publishing' AND (c.approvalStatus != 'ARCHIVED' OR NOT IS_DEFINED(c.approvalStatus))))
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='inventory_item' AND (c.isBook=true OR c.industryPack='publishing') ORDER BY c.updatedAt DESC

SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.sku, c.name, c.priceUsd, c.currency, c.stockQty, c.category, c.description, c.tags, c.images, c.attributes, c.costUsd, c.taxable, c.jurisdictionCode, c.industryPack, c.metrics, c.createdAt, c.updatedAt, c.isBook, c.bookFileUrl, c.bookCoverUrl, c.approvalStatus, c.contentDetails, c.releaseDate, c.previewUrl, c.allowDownload, c.drmEnabled, c.isSubscription, c.subscriptionPlanId FROM c WHERE c.type='inventory_item' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='uber_eats_order' AND c.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'DELIVERED')
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='uber_eats_order' AND (c.orderId=@orderId OR ENDSWITH(c.orderId, @shortId))
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.receiptId = @id AND c.wallet = @wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'merchant_team_member' AND c.merchantWallet = @wallet AND c.pinHash = @hash AND c.active = true
SELECT c.id FROM c WHERE c.type='terminal_session' AND c.merchantWallet=@w AND c.staffId=@sid AND (NOT IS_DEFINED(c.tipsPaid) OR c.tipsPaid=false) AND IS_DEFINED(c.endTime)
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'merchant_team_member' AND c.merchantWallet = @wallet

SELECT c.id, c.startTime, c.endTime, c.totalSales, c.totalTips, c.tipsPaid, c.tipsPaidAt FROM c WHERE c.type='terminal_session' AND c.merchantWallet=@w AND c.staffId=@memberId ORDER BY c.startTime DESC
SELECT c.employeeId, SUM(c.totalUsd) as total, SUM(c.tipAmount) as tips FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@w AND IS_DEFINED(c.employeeId) GROUP BY c.employeeId

SELECT c.staffId, MAX(c.startTime) as lastActive, SUM(c.totalTips) as unpaidTips FROM c WHERE c.type='terminal_session' AND c.merchantWallet=@w AND (NOT IS_DEFINED(c.tipsPaid) OR c.tipsPaid=false) GROUP BY c.staffId
SELECT c.staffId, MAX(c.startTime) as lastActive FROM c WHERE c.type='terminal_session' AND c.merchantWallet=@w GROUP BY c.staffId
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.brandKey, c.participants, c.subject, c.lastMessageAt, c.createdAt
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.brandKey, c.participants, c.subject, c.lastMessageAt, c.createdAt
SELECT DISTINCT VALUE m.conversationId FROM m WHERE m.type='message' AND (m.senderWallet=@me OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(m.readBy, @me))
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.brandKey, c.participants, c.subject, c.lastMessageAt, c.createdAt
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.participants, c.brandKey FROM c WHERE c.type='conversation' AND c.id=@id
SELECT m.id, m.wallet, m.conversationId, m.senderWallet, m.body, m.attachments, m.createdAt, m.readBy
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.participants, c.brandKey FROM c WHERE c.type='conversation' AND c.id=@id
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.isBook = true
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.contentDetails.usbn = @usbn AND c.isBook = true

SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.currency, c.lineItems, c.createdAt, c.brandName, c.jurisdictionCode, c.taxRate, c.taxComponents, c.status, c.buyerWallet, c.shopSlug, c.metadata, c.transactionHash FROM c WHERE c.type = 'receipt' AND c.buyerWallet = @buyer
SELECT c.merchant FROM c WHERE c.type='user_merchant' AND c.wallet=@buyer
SELECT c.merchantWallet FROM c WHERE c.type='split_index' AND c.brandKey=@brand
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.createdAt FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 200
SELECT c.id, c.receiptId, c.buyerWallet, c.transactionHash FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.transactionHash=@txHash
SELECT TOP 1 c.purchaseData, c.transactions FROM c WHERE c.type='payment_event_thirdweb' AND c.brandKey=@brand

SELECT c.lineItems, c.totalUsd, c.receiptId, c.createdAt FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND (LOWER(c.status)='checkout_initialized' OR LOWER(c.status)='buyer_logged_in' OR LOWER(c.status)='link_opened') ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 50
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId, c.createdAt, c.expectedToken, c.expectedAmountToken, c.metadata FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 200
SELECT TOP 1 c.purchaseData, c.transactions FROM c WHERE c.type='payment_event_thirdweb' AND c.brandKey=@brand
SELECT c.receiptId FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.transactionHash=@tx AND STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix)
SELECT c.receiptId, c.createdAt, c.totalUsd FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix)
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId, c.createdAt, c.metadata FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.createdAt BETWEEN @start AND @end

SELECT c.lineItems, c.totalUsd, c.receiptId, c.createdAt FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND (LOWER(c.status)='checkout_initialized' OR LOWER(c.status)='buyer_logged_in' OR LOWER(c.status)='link_opened') ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 50

SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.createdAt, c.status FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.createdAt BETWEEN @start AND @end AND c.totalUsd >= @minUsd AND c.totalUsd <= @maxUsd

SELECT c.lineItems, c.totalUsd, c.receiptId, c.createdAt FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND (LOWER(c.status)='checkout_initialized' OR LOWER(c.status)='buyer_logged_in' OR LOWER(c.status)='link_opened') ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 50
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.transactionHash=@tx
SELECT TOP 1 c.purchaseData, c.destinationToken, c.originToken, c.transactions FROM c WHERE c.type='payment_event_thirdweb' AND c.brandKey=@brand
SELECT c.receiptId FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.transactionHash=@tx AND STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix)
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.createdAt FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 200
SELECT TOP 1 c.purchaseData, c.transactions FROM c WHERE c.type='payment_event_thirdweb' AND c.brandKey=@brand
SELECT c.receiptId FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.transactionHash=@tx AND STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix)
SELECT c.receiptId, c.createdAt, c.totalUsd FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix)

SELECT c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.createdAt, c.lineItems, c.status, c.transactionHash FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND (LOWER(c.status)='paid' OR LOWER(c.status)='reconciled' OR IS_DEFINED(c.transactionHash)) ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 200

SELECT c.lineItems, c.totalUsd, c.receiptId, c.createdAt FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND (LOWER(c.status)='checkout_initialized' OR LOWER(c.status)='buyer_logged_in' OR LOWER(c.status)='link_opened') ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC OFFSET 0 LIMIT 200
SELECT c.receiptId FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.totalUsd <= @zero AND STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix)

SELECT c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.createdAt, c.status, c.transactionHash FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND (LOWER(c.status)='checkout_initialized' OR LOWER(c.status)='buyer_logged_in' OR LOWER(c.status)='link_opened')
SELECT c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.createdAt FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix)

SELECT TOP 1 c.receiptId FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@merchant AND c.buyerWallet=@buyer AND NOT STARTSWITH(c.receiptId, @prefix) AND ABS(c.totalUsd - @total) <= @tol ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.sku, c.name, c.priceUsd, c.updatedAt FROM c WHERE c.type='inventory_item' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT TOP 1 c FROM c WHERE c.type=@type AND c.wallet=@wallet AND (IS_DEFINED(c.splitAddress) OR (IS_DEFINED(c.split.address) AND LENGTH(c.split.address) > 0)) ORDER BY c.updatedAt DESC

SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.docType='discount' AND c.status='active' AND (c.shopId=@wallet OR LOWER(c.shopId)=@walletLower OR c.shopSlug=@shopSlug OR LOWER(c.shopSlug)=@shopSlug OR c.shopId=@platformWallet OR LOWER(c.shopId)=@platformWallet)
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.docType='discount' AND c.status='active' AND (c.shopId=@wallet OR LOWER(c.shopId)=@walletLower OR c.shopSlug=@shopSlug OR LOWER(c.shopSlug)=@shopSlug)
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.docType='discount' AND c.status='active' AND (c.shopId=@wallet OR LOWER(c.shopId)=@walletLower OR c.shopId=@platformWallet OR LOWER(c.shopId)=@platformWallet)
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.docType='discount' AND c.status='active' AND (c.shopId=@wallet OR LOWER(c.shopId)=@walletLower)

SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.sku, c.name, c.priceUsd, c.currency, c.stockQty, c.category, c.description, c.tags, c.images, c.attributes, c.costUsd, c.taxable, c.jurisdictionCode, c.metrics, c.createdAt, c.updatedAt FROM c WHERE c.type='inventory_item' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'receipt' AND LOWER(c.receiptId) = @id
SELECT c.id, c.status FROM c WHERE c.type = 'client_request' AND c.wallet = @w AND c.brandKey = @brand
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'client_request' AND c.id = @id AND c.brandKey = @brand
SELECT * FROM c WHERE (c.type = 'site_config' OR c.type = 'shop_config') AND StringEquals(c.wallet, @w, true) AND StringEquals(c.brandKey, @brand, true) ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT TOP 1 c.id, c.brandKey FROM c WHERE (c.type = 'shop_config' OR c.type = 'site_config') AND c.slug = @slug AND c.wallet != @wallet
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'client_request' AND c.id = @id AND c.brandKey = @brand
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.wallet = @w
SELECT * FROM c WHERE (c.type = 'client_request' OR c.type = 'site_config' OR c.type = 'shop_config') AND StringEquals(c.brandKey, @brand, true) ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = @type AND c.id = @id
SELECT c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type = @type

SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.brandKey, c.companyName, c.contactName, c.contactEmail, c.appUrl, c.partnerFeeBps, c.defaultMerchantFeeBps, c.partnerWallet, c.colors, c.logos, c.meta, c.notes, c.status, c.createdAt, c.updatedAt, c.approvedAt, c.approvedBy FROM c WHERE c.type = @type
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = @type AND c.id = @id
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = @type AND c.id = @id
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.type = 'pms_staff'
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_cleaning_task' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_group_booking' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_folio' AND c.id = @folioId AND c.pmsSlug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_message' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_night_audit' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug AND c.auditDate = @date
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_night_audit' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_rate_plan' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug ORDER BY c.roomTypeName ASC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_reservation' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_instance' AND c.slug = @slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type = 'pms_work_order' AND c.pmsSlug = @slug
SELECT c.id FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT TOP @limit c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.currency, c.lineItems, c.createdAt, c.brandName, c.status FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@w
SELECT TOP 1 * FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.receiptId=@id
SELECT TOP 1 c.config.slug, c.config.name FROM c WHERE c.type='shop' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT TOP 1 c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type='site_config' AND (LOWER(c.splitAddress)=@addr OR LOWER(c.split.address)=@addr)

SELECT TOP 1 c.receiptId, c.totalUsd, c.currency, c.lineItems, c.createdAt, c.wallet, c.brandName, c.status, c.refunds, c.jurisdictionCode, c.taxRate, c.taxComponents, c.transactionHash, c.transactionTimestamp, c.employeeId, c.tipAmount, c.buyerWallet FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.receiptId=@id ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC

SELECT TOP 1 c.productId, c.amountUsd, c.wallet, c.payTo, c.status, c.correlationId, c.attemptedAt, c.settledAt FROM c WHERE (c.type='apim_subscription_payment' OR c.type='apim_subscription_tip') AND c.correlationId=@id ORDER BY c.attemptedAt DESC

SELECT TOP 1 c.productId, c.amountUsd, c.wallet, c.payTo, c.status, c.correlationId, c.attemptedAt, c.settledAt FROM c WHERE (c.type='apim_subscription_payment' OR c.type='apim_subscription_tip') AND c.correlationId=@id ORDER BY c.attemptedAt DESC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @docId
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.receiptId = @id
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.authorWallet, c.subject, c.orderRef, c.rating, c.title, c.body, c.createdAt, c.updatedAt
SELECT c.id, c.wallet, c.receiptId, c.lineItems, c.status, c.buyerWallet, c.shopSlug
SELECT TOP 1 c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND c.slug=@slug
SELECT c.id FROM c WHERE c.type='review' AND (c.brandKey=@brand OR NOT IS_DEFINED(c.brandKey) OR c.brandKey = null OR c.brandKey = '') AND c.authorWallet=@author
SELECT TOP 1 c.id, c.wallet, c.slug FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND LOWER(c.slug)=@s
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.docType = 'discount'
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND c.wallet=@wallet
SELECT TOP 1 c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND c.customDomain=@domain AND c.customDomainVerified=true
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND c.wallet=@w
SELECT c.slug, c.name, c.brandKey FROM c WHERE c.type = 'shop_config' AND c.wallet = @wallet AND c.slug != null
SELECT c.slug FROM c WHERE c.wallet = @wallet AND c.slug != null
SELECT TOP 1 c.wallet, c.slug, c.brandKey, c.customDomain, c.customDomainVerified FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND (c.slug=@slug OR (c.customDomain=@slug AND c.customDomainVerified=true))
SELECT TOP 1 c.wallet, c.slug, c.brandKey FROM c WHERE c.type='shop_config' AND c.slug=@slug
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.wallet = @wallet AND c.type = 'shop_config'
SELECT TOP 1 c.id, c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type='site_config' AND (LOWER(c.splitAddress)=@addr OR LOWER(c.split.address)=@addr)
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='user'
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary'
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.durationSeconds) FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary'
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.seconds) FROM c WHERE c.type='usage'
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.usedSeconds) FROM c WHERE c.type='user' AND IS_DEFINED(c.usedSeconds)
SELECT c.liveSince, c.lastHeartbeat FROM c WHERE c.type='user' AND c.live = true AND c.spacePublic = true AND c.lastHeartbeat > @cutoff
SELECT c.domain, c.languages, c.platform, c.topics FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary'
SELECT c.metrics FROM c WHERE c.type='user' AND IS_DEFINED(c.metrics)
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary' AND c.ts > @since
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.durationSeconds) FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary' AND c.ts > @since
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary' AND c.ts > @since
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.durationSeconds) FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary' AND c.ts > @since
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.xp) FROM c WHERE c.type='user' AND IS_DEFINED(c.xp)
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.purchasedSeconds) FROM c WHERE c.type='user' AND IS_DEFINED(c.purchasedSeconds)
SELECT VALUE c.durationSeconds FROM c WHERE c.type='session_summary' AND c.ts > @since
SELECT c.wallet, c.brandKey, c.theme FROM c WHERE c.type='site_config'
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.totalVolumeUsd) FROM c WHERE c.type='split_index' AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.merchantWallet)
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.totalVolumeUsd) FROM c WHERE c.type='split_index'
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.wallet)
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.totalUsd) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.wallet)
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid'
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.totalUsd) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid'
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND c.createdAt > @since AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.wallet)
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.totalUsd) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND c.createdAt > @since AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.wallet)
SELECT VALUE COUNT(1) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND c.createdAt > @since
SELECT VALUE SUM(c.totalUsd) FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND c.createdAt > @since
SELECT DISTINCT VALUE c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.wallet)
SELECT DISTINCT VALUE c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid'
SELECT VALUE c.currency FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND IS_DEFINED(c.currency) AND ARRAY_CONTAINS(@wallets, c.wallet)
SELECT VALUE c.currency FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.status='paid' AND IS_DEFINED(c.currency)

SELECT c.id, c.receiptId, c.status, c.createdAt, c.expectedToken, c.expectedAmountToken, c.expectedUsd, c.buyerWallet, c.transactionHash FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@w AND c.createdAt>=@start
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.brandKey = @brandKey ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.user = @user ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id
SELECT * FROM c WHERE (c.type = 'shop_config' OR c.type = 'site_config') AND c.wallet = @w
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.role FROM c WHERE c.type = 'merchant_team_member' AND c.merchantWallet = @w AND c.pinHash = @ph

SELECT c.brandKey FROM c WHERE c.type = 'shop_config' AND c.wallet = @w
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.type = 'terminal_session'
SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.merchantWallet = @mw AND c.type = 'merchant_team_member' AND c.linkedWallet = @lw AND (c.role = 'manager' OR c.role = 'owner')

SELECT * FROM c WHERE c.id = @id AND c.type = 'terminal_session'
SELECT c.id, c.startTime, c.endTime, c.totalSales, c.totalTips FROM c WHERE c.type = 'terminal_session' AND c.staffId = @staffId AND c.createdAt >= @startOfDay AND c.brandKey = @brandKey
SELECT c.id, c.startTime, c.endTime, c.totalSales, c.totalTips FROM c WHERE c.type = 'terminal_session' AND c.staffId = @staffId AND c.createdAt >= @startOfDay
SELECT TOP 5 c.id, c.staffId, c.createdAt, c.wallet FROM c WHERE c.type='terminal_session' AND c.staffId = @staffId ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC
SELECT TOP 5 c.id, c.sessionId, c.status, c.totalUsd FROM c WHERE c.type='receipt' AND c.wallet=@wallet ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC

SELECT VALUE { totalSales: SUM(c.totalUsd), totalTips: SUM(c.tipAmount), count: COUNT(1) } FROM c WHERE c.type = 'receipt' AND c.wallet = @wallet AND (c.staffId = @staffId OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(@sessionIds, c.sessionId)) AND c.createdAt >= @startOfDay AND LOWER(c.status) IN ('paid', 'checkout_success', 'confirmed', 'tx_mined', 'reconciled', 'settled', 'completed')

SELECT c.id, c.receiptId, c.createdAt, c.totalUsd, c.tipAmount, c.status, c.tableNumber FROM c WHERE c.type = 'receipt' AND c.wallet = @wallet AND (c.staffId = @staffId OR ARRAY_CONTAINS(@sessionIds, c.sessionId)) AND c.createdAt >= @startOfDay AND LOWER(c.status) IN ('paid', 'checkout_success', 'confirmed', 'tx_mined', 'reconciled', 'settled', 'completed') ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC

SELECT VALUE { totalSales: SUM(c.totalUsd), totalTips: SUM(c.tipAmount) } FROM c WHERE c.type = 'receipt' AND c.sessionId = @sid AND LOWER(c.status) IN ('paid', 'checkout_success', 'confirmed', 'tx_mined', 'reconciled', 'settled', 'completed')
